title: leucanthemum ircutianum var. sylvestre
intro: Leucanthemum ircutianum var. sylvestre, also known as the alpine daisy, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of leucanthemum ircutianum var. sylvestre include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Leucanthemum ircutianum var. sylvestre can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
